# NIP-40 Reference Card

NIP-40: Expiration Timestamp. Tag: `expiration`. Value: `[UNIX timestamp in seconds]`. Required. Example: `{"tags": [["expiration", "1600000000"]]}`. Clients ignore expired events. Relays may not delete expired messages immediately, but should not send them to clients.
